title: The Fast, Or Lent.
content:
Noah the first was, as tradition says,
    That did ordain the fast of forty days.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "The Fast, Or Lent.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
